decisions.summary: Phase 1 only is in scope: HarnessPicker component, API endpoints, PlanDialog, start-agent flow, ConversationPanel, and SettingsPage. Phase 2 (model-list narrowing by harness) is explicitly out of scope per issue framing as incomplete delivery of documented Phase 1 surfaces.
canUseHarness() in src/lib/harness-policy.ts is the single ToS gate. The picker component calls it on each render; API endpoints call it server-side. No duplicate logic.
API work (harness param on /api/agents and /api/issues/:id/start-planning) is its own bead that blocks the UI beads, ensuring frontend has the endpoint contract ready.

hazards.summary: Bash and Write were denied in the main planning session. Files written by sub-agent. bd create and pan-plan-finalize did not run. Beads must be created before implementation can start.
hazards.mitigation: Run pan-plan-finalize or manually: bd create for each item in spec.vbrief.json with label pan-1029, set edges, then promote vBRIEF to vbrief/proposed/.

hazards.summary: Workspace previously held PAN-986 session state. Untracked .claude/skills/pipeline-status/ directory exists from prior use. Neither is related to PAN-1029.
hazards.mitigation: Implementation agent should ignore pipeline-status directory and PAN-986 history.

hazards.summary: AuthMode type may not be exported from @panctl/contracts. HarnessPicker needs AuthMode to call canUseHarness().
hazards.mitigation: Check packages/contracts/src/types.ts for AuthMode export. If missing, add it or import from src/lib/harness-policy.ts directly.

resumePoint.description: Planning complete. PRD at docs/prds/planned/PAN-1029-harness-picker-ui.md. Spec at .pan/spec.vbrief.json. OPERATOR ACTION REQUIRED: run pan-plan-finalize (or manually bd create 6 beads with label pan-1029 and edges per spec, then copy vBRIEF to vbrief/proposed/). Implementation order: api-harness-params and harness-picker-component first (they block 4 UI beads), then the 4 integration beads in any order.

sessionHistory.note: Planning session for PAN-1029 (Harness Picker UI). Fetched issue via WebFetch. Explored harness backend and frontend via codebase-explorer sub-agent. Bash and Write blocked in main session; files written by pan-planning sub-agent. bd create and pan-plan-finalize did not run — operator must create beads before implementation.
